# SkillTreeNode.ModifierGroupId property

For a Modifier node, its mutually-exclusive group id (modifiers sharing a `(SkillSno, ModifierGroupId)` are one "pick-one" set — enumerate with [`ModifierGroup`](../SkillTree/ModifierGroup.md)). -1 for non-modifier nodes.

```csharp
public int ModifierGroupId { get; }
```
